params.name: Siemens DC Generator
params.description:
On Sept 26, 1866 AD, Siemens proposed the working principle of the self-excited DC generator.
About thirty years after the hand-cranked DC generator was invented, Siemens improved the construction of the DC generator after research and feedback part of the electricity generated to increase the magnetic pole's magnetism. This product, called a self-excited DC generator, greatly improved the generator's efficiency and greatly promoted the development process of the electrical era.
